summary.zh: 詹姆斯·亨特与劳达之间展开了 F1 历史上最富戏剧性的冠军之争之一——劳达在纽伯格林遭遇几乎致命的重大事故后迅速复出参赛，但亨特最终在日本收官战以 1 分优势险胜夺冠。
summary.en: James Hunt and Lauda fought one of the most dramatic title battles in F1 history - Lauda returned to racing remarkably soon after a near-fatal crash at the Nürburgring, but Hunt won the championship by a single point at the Japanese finale.

content.zh: 詹姆斯·亨特与劳达之间展开了 F1 历史上最富戏剧性的冠军之争之一——劳达在纽伯格林遭遇几乎致命的重大事故后迅速复出参赛，但亨特最终在日本收官战以 1 分优势险胜夺冠。
content.en: James Hunt and Lauda fought one of the most dramatic title battles in F1 history - Lauda returned to racing remarkably soon after a near-fatal crash at the Nürburgring, but Hunt won the championship by a single point at the Japanese finale.
